name: Gift
description: This object represents a gift that can be sent by the bot.

fields.name: sticker
fields.description: The sticker that represents the gift

fields.name: star_count
fields.description: The number of Telegram Stars that must be paid to send the sticker

fields.name: upgrade_star_count
fields.description: The number of Telegram Stars that must be paid to upgrade the gift to a unique one

fields.name: is_premium
fields.description: True, if the gift can only be purchased by Telegram Premium subscribers

fields.name: has_colors
fields.description: True, if the gift can be used (after being upgraded) to customize a user's appearance

fields.name: total_count
fields.description: The total number of gifts of this type that can be sent by all users; for limited gifts only

fields.name: remaining_count
fields.description: The number of remaining gifts of this type that can be sent by all users; for limited gifts only

fields.name: personal_total_count
fields.description: The total number of gifts of this type that can be sent by the bot; for limited gifts only

fields.name: personal_remaining_count
fields.description: The number of remaining gifts of this type that can be sent by the bot; for limited gifts only

fields.name: unique_gift_variant_count
fields.description: The total number of different unique gifts that can be obtained by upgrading the gift

fields.name: publisher_chat
fields.description: Information about the chat that published the gift
